skillPurpose: Orchestrate backend DDD workflow through controlled analyze/refactor loop

skill.SKILL.md: Skill definition with purpose, usage, workflow phases, configuration
skill.scripts/af-be-ddd-orchestrate.py: Python implementation with structured error handling
skill.references/orchestration-workflow.md: Detailed workflow specification with examples and integration points
skill.references/skill-integration.md: User guide covering quick start, prerequisites, configuration, troubleshooting

turn.execution_trace.json: Execution trace with artifacts and summary
turn.adr.md: Architecture Decision Record covering design decisions and rationale

workflowPhases.name: Configuration Validation
workflowPhases.description: Read and validate CLAUDE.md for max_ddd_tries

workflowPhases.name: Initial Build
workflowPhases.description: Invoke af-be-ddd-build to generate DDD specification

workflowPhases.name: Analyze & Refactor Loop
workflowPhases.description: Iteratively invoke analysis and refactoring (bounded by max_ddd_tries)

workflowPhases.name: Test Generation
workflowPhases.description: Invoke af-be-ddd-tests to generate and validate test suite

workflowPhases.name: Results Reporting
workflowPhases.description: Generate comprehensive execution report with metrics

documentation.orchestration-workflow.md: Complete workflow specification with detailed examples
documentation.skill-integration.md: Integration guide with troubleshooting and best practices

notes: Skill created with dual implementations (shell and Python), comprehensive documentation, and detailed architecture decision record
